security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: asset: http://asset.localhost; media-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://github.com https://api.github.com https://objects.githubusercontent.com; worker-src 'self' blob:; object-src 'none'; frame-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'
security.devCsp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: asset: http://asset.localhost; media-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost ws://localhost:* ws://127.0.0.1:* https://github.com https://api.github.com https://objects.githubusercontent.com; worker-src 'self' blob:; object-src 'none'; frame-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: A terminal-first cockpit for CLI coding agents.
bundle.longDescription: Beecork Terminal is a desktop cockpit for CLI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, any CLI): a full terminal, a live git-aware diff view, and a file browser/editor side by side.
